metadata.description: Agent-facing deep research: fan one question across several models, cross-check them into a single synthesis, and return an epistemic sidecar (claims, cross-model divergences, a verification queue).

plugins.name: mantis-research
plugins.description: A `research` MCP tool that runs one question through several research models, cross-checks them into a single synthesis, and returns an epistemic sidecar. Synthesis stages drive the local `claude` CLI, so run co-located with an authenticated Claude Code seat.
